MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant The Tide Center's motion to reclassify unlimited civil case to limited civil case is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
